data.name: 服侍人偶的日常
data.detailed_description:
■與爆乳機器人的日常模擬遊戲


從地下室逃離的半年後――我開啟了與服侍人偶艾夏的甜蜜日常！
趕快來體驗與爆乳機器人艾夏在同一個屋簷下展開的沒羞沒臊的生活！
大受好評的【逃離性慾服侍人偶的房間】的續作！

■搖晃胸部！Q彈！爆乳3D動畫


與前作一樣，H場景是桃山プロダクション老師擅長的3D動畫！
請盡情享受令人震撼的巨乳動畫！

■還有許多讓人心花怒放活動！


不只有動畫！也準備了很多H事件給各位玩家！
在客廳、廚房、浴室、廁所......甚至還有海邊！？
讓有著無法抑制的慾望的艾夏盡情為您服務！

■頭腦體操？來挑戰解開謎題吧！


也會有艾夏在日常生活中要求您解謎的情況出現？
因為艾夏非常喜歡出謎題，嘗試解開吧！！
如果完美解答的話可能會從艾夏那邊得到獎勵？
前作的逃脫要素，續作也完美的繼承了！

■然後是接下來的故事......？


本作也有為下一部作品留下伏筆，
出現了艾夏以外的服侍人偶......？

data.short_description: 與為服侍你而生的爆乳機器人【服侍人偶艾夏】開啟一段甜蜜的日常生活吧！這款是【逃離性慾服侍人偶的房間】的續作！日常模擬遊戲，H場景跟前作一樣使用3D動畫，柔軟與質感並存的爆乳動畫一定不能錯過！與艾夏一起享受甜蜜的愛情生活吧！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Daily Life of Serving Doll
data.detailed_description:
■Daily simulation game with Breasted Robot


Six months after escaping from the basement - I started a sweet routine with a service doll， Aisha！
Come and experience the shameless life under the same roof as Aisha， the breast-expanding robot！
The sequel to the critically acclaimed “Escape from the Room of the Serving Doll”！

■Shake boobs！ Breasts 3D animation


Like its predecessor， H-Scene is a 3D film created by the master of 桃山プロダクション！
Enjoy the stunning breast animation！

■And many more exciting events！

Not just animation！ We have lots of H events in store for you！
In the living room， kitchen， bathroom， toilet ...... And even on the beach！
Let Aisha， who has an insatiable appetite， serve you with all her might！

■Brain Teaser？ Take on the challenge and solve the puzzles！


Will there be times when Aisha asks you to solve puzzles in your daily life？ Aisha loves puzzles， so try to solve them！ You might get a bonus from Aisha for a perfect answer？ The escape elements of the first game carry over perfectly into the sequel！

■And then the following story ......？


It also leaves the door open for the next instalment.
Appearance of service dolls other than Aisha ......？

data.short_description: Start a sweet life with the breast-expanding robot [Service Doll Aisha] who was born to serve you！This is the sequel to “Escape from the Room of the Serving Doll”！Uses the same 3D animation for the H scene as its predecessor， and you can't miss the soft and textured breast animation！
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
